allow: Bash(node -e "const pkg = require\('./package.json'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(Object.entries\(pkg.scripts\).filter\(\([k]\) => k.includes\('test'\) || k.includes\('e2e'\) || k.includes\('playwright'\)\), null, 2\)\)")

Bash(node -e " const fs=require\('fs'\); fs.rmSync\('report_extracted',{recursive:true,force:true}\); const html=fs.readFileSync\('playwright-report/index.html','utf8'\); const m=html.match\(/data:application\\/[^\\"']+;base64,\([A-Za-z0-9+/=]+\)/\); fs.writeFileSync\('report.zip',Buffer.from\(m[1],'base64'\)\); " unzip -o report.zip -d report_extracted node -e " const fs=require\('fs'\); for\(const f of fs.readdirSync\('report_extracted'\).filter\(n=>n!=='report.json'\)\){ const d=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('report_extracted/'+f,'utf8'\)\); for\(const t of d.tests||[]\){ if\(t.outcome==='unexpected'\){ console.log\('=== FAIL ===', d.fileName, '>', t.title, '['+t.projectName+']'\); for\(const r of t.results||[]\){ for\(const e of r.errors||[]\){ console.log\(\(e.message||''\).replace\(/\\x1b\\[[0-9;]*m/g,''\)\); console.log\('---'\); } } } } } ")
